ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Drama. Da cantarsi nel Collegio Clementino nel Carnevale dell`anno 1690

Censors.ItacPersonItem: Menattus,Stephanus Ioseph,Vicar General|Master of the Sacred Palace,? - 1695

ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, Si videbitur Reverendiss. P. Sac. Apost. Pal. Mag. Stephanus Joseph Menattus Episc. Cyrenen. Vicesger. - Imprimatur, Fr. Francisus Maria Forlani Reverendiss. P. F. Thomae Mariae Ferrari Sac. ap. Pal. Mag. Soc. Ord. Praed.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
